name: Streammirrarr
description: Exact-match stream consolidation. Attaches duplicate streams from failover M3U accounts onto the channels created by your source-of-truth account, matching by exact name + provider stream_id. No fuzzy matching — runs in seconds, safe to run daily.
author: Roy Dufek

actions.label: 🔍 Preview (dry-run)
actions.description: Compute exactly what would change and report it. Writes nothing.

confirm.title: Run exact-match reconcile?
confirm.message: Rebuilds failover streams on matched channels: attaches exact stream_id matches and removes mismatched managed streams. Proceed?

actions.label: 📄 View last results
actions.description: Show the report from the most recent run.

actions.label: 🧹 Clear operation lock
actions.description: Force-clear a stuck run lock if a previous run was interrupted.
